entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING WEST AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS AROUND 50

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
